--- layout: default title: How to Restore and Shrink a Database Log Using SQL Management Studio nav_order: 280 --- {% raw %}

How to Restore and Shrink a Database Log Using SQL Management Studio

Create a new query in SQL Studio using the following script and replace MYDBNAME with the site database name: USE MYDBNAME;

GO

-- Truncate the log by changing the database recovery model to SIMPLE.

ALTER DATABASE MYDBNAME

SET RECOVERY SIMPLE;

GO

-- Shrink the truncated log file to 1 MB. DBCC SHRINKFILE (MYDBNAME_Log, 1);

GO

-- Reset the database recovery model.

ALTER DATABASE MYDBNAME

SET RECOVERY FULL;

GO
